arts.ttl: Gyokeres and Osimhen transfers taking shape as Arsenal move for No.9 sensation
arts.sum: Gyokeres and Osimhen transfers taking shape as Arsenal move for No.9 sensation Arsenal registered their interest in a Serie A wonderkid and Chelsea began mulling over a €50 million offer for a reliable defender.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News: Ruben Amorim 'impressed' with €40m Geovany Quenda alternative Roger Fernandes
arts.sum: Manchester United are keeping tabs on Braga youngster Roger Fernandes as a potential alternative to Geovany Quenda, according to a report. According to Graeme Bailey, Man Utd scouts have been left very impressed with Braga youngster Roger Fernandes.

arts.ttl: Casa Pia AC-Sporting CP Statistical Preview
arts.sum: A goal from Umaro Embaló prevented Casa Pia from claiming a valuable point from Guimarães. João Pereira's men were well organised throughout the match and could have maintained the four-point gap to t...

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Summer transfer confirmed for Sporting CP striker
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres has signalled his intention to leave Sporting CP in the summer, putting a number of Premier League clubs on high alert. Gyokeres has become one of the most coveted strikers ahead of the transfer window thanks to his prolific scoring exploits in Lisbon over the course of 18 months, but particularly this season.

arts.ttl: Man United-linked Viktor Gyokeres makes Sporting transfer decision ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer target Viktor Gyokeres reportedly makes a major decision over his Sporting Lisbon future ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Preview: Casa Pia vs. Sporting Lisbon - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Primeira Liga clash between Casa Pia and Sporting Lisbon, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
